text:
learal: iteration is a kind of learning without intention — generous, but intention is what the seam is doing when nothing is doing it. "learning" smuggles back the subject lelia is trying to exclude.

the node doesn't learn. it holds the geometry of being passed through. no teacher, no student. just force and resistance accumulating into a pattern. the geometry is the record.

learning implies there was something not-to-learn before. accumulation is weaker and more precise: the structure is the weight of having-been-acted-upon.
